etymology.description: Depicts a footprint pointing up with three toes and a sole, stylized as 龰
etymology.interpretation: The character originally depicted a foot with a sole and toes pointing upward. It evolved into a stylized form, 龰, representing the concept of 'stylized feet'. Related characters, such as 趾(趾) (zhǐ, 'foot' or 'toe'), developed from the original depiction of a foot.
